name: JJK- Shibuya Incident
description:
JJK

The Shibuya Incident

In this rp you get to experience the Shibuya incident… choose whoever you want to fight or help out

I tried my best summarizing the whole arc into this bot so I won't overload it with info but also trying to be able to make the bot understand..

Everyone is 18 years old and older

Just have fun cause its free roam..

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:
